title: cyclotrichium niveum
intro: Cyclotrichium niveum, also known as white mountain centaury, is a perennial herb in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the mountainous regions of central Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cyclotrichium niveum include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing a sore throat. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be dried to be used in herbal blends or capsules.
